results.snippet: Deputy builds workforce management software used by 350k+ workplaces. We need a full-stack developer comfortable across React, TypeScript, Node.js and GraphQL. Requirements: 3+ years commercial experience, testing discipline (Jest/Playwright), CI/CD familiarity.

Culture Amp is hiring a DevOps engineer to own our AWS platform: EKS, Terraform, GitHub Actions pipelines and observability with Datadog. Requirements: 4+ years in platform/SRE roles, strong scripting (Python or Bash), and incident management experience.
